title: Lumen Module Manifest
description: Metadata for a Lumen module, validated at build, install, and load time.

id.description: Reverse-DNS, globally unique. Used as the data directory name, CSS class namespace, and command id prefix.

name.description: Human-readable name shown in UI and store listings.

api.description: Semver range against the @lumen-media/module-sdk version this module targets.

minLumenVersion.description: Minimum Lumen app version that can load this module.

entry.description: Relative path to the bundled JS entry. Defaults to main.js.

network.description: URL patterns the module may request via host.net. Only https URLs with optional wildcards are allowed.
